source_pr.title: distsql, executor: fix select channel bug that may discard error.
source_pr.body:
When select receives two channels, both of them can return, which case will
be selected is undetermined.

Use one channel with resp and error to avoid this issue.

symptoms: distsql, executor: fix race bug that may discard error.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: distsql, executor: fix select channel bug that may discard error.
